features.featureTitle: Resize and reformat the calendar view in DashboardPage so it fits properly within the screen without overflowing or being clipped. The calendar grid must be compact, fully visible, and well-proportioned on both mobile and desktop viewport sizes. Ensure the calendar container uses constrained max-width, appropriate font sizes for day labels and date numbers, and sufficient but not excessive padding/margins so no part of the calendar is hidden or cut off. The calendar should remain styled consistently with the app's terracotta/cream theme.
